settings.title: Return Eligibility
settings.text: Due to the handcrafted and personal nature of our products, returns are handled on a case-by-case basis. Unused products in original condition may be eligible for return approval within 14 days of delivery.

settings.title: Non-Returnable Items
settings.text: Custom candles, made-to-order products, and used items are generally non-returnable unless there is a quality issue or shipping damage.

settings.title: Damaged or Incorrect Orders
settings.text: If you receive a damaged, defective, or incorrect item, contact us within 5 days of delivery. Include your order number and clear photos so we can resolve the issue quickly.

settings.title: Refund Process
settings.text: Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method after the item is received and inspected (if a return shipment is required). Your financial institution may require additional posting time.

settings.title: Exchanges & Replacements
settings.text: When possible, we may offer replacement products or store credit as an alternative to refunds, depending on product availability and the nature of the issue.

settings.caption: Policy Information
settings.heading: Returns & Refunds
settings.text: We want you to love your Candles By Victoria order. This policy explains our return, replacement, and refund expectations.
